checks.expectation: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /user/1/activity -- verify the page renders with a dynamic title containing the admin user's display name and shows activity summary content (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: Page title: 'Activity for admin | Drush Site-Install' — contains admin display name. Activity summary content present: 'nodes authored: 0', 'last access: 03/07/2026 - 07:36'. HTTP 200. Page renders successfully.

checks.expectation: Navigate to /api/user/1/activity -- verify the response contains valid JSON with activity data fields (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: HTTP 200. Response is valid JSON: {"uid":"1","display_name":"admin","nodes_authored":0,"last_access":"1772894207"}. Contains all expected activity data fields: uid, display_name, nodes_authored, last_access.
